sources.name: DIM Choosy Voltron
sources.description: Voltron with opinionated trash roll signals. Do not score all entries as positive because this file also includes Voltron recommendations.

sources.name: MrCharles Aegis S PPC1
sources.description: Aegis-derived strict PvE endgame boost for S-tier weapons with at least one preferred perk per column.

sources.name: MrCharles Aegis A PPC1
sources.description: Aegis-derived practical PvE endgame wishlist for A-tier and above weapons with at least one preferred perk per column.

sources.name: MrCharles Aegis F PPC0
sources.description: Broad Aegis-derived reference list that covers all weapon tiers and should be used for explanation, not strong keep decisions.
